metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - Password spray (single IP, many users)
properties.description: One source IP generates failed sign-ins (50126/50053/50055/50056) across 5+ distinct users within the window. Classic password spray. Tune the user threshold to your tenant size.
properties.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType in (50126,50053,50055,50056) | summarize Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName), Targets=make_set(UserPrincipalName,50), Attempts=count() by IPAddress, bin(TimeGenerated,1h) | where Users >= 5
